title: pavonia urens var. hanangensis
intro: Pavonia urens var. hanangensis is a plant species within the mallow family (Malvaceae) native to the mountainous regions of Tanzania. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The plant is used to treat various health conditions, such as wound healing, skin infections, and digestive issues, due to its ability to promote tissue repair and reduce inflammation. Herbal preparations of Pavonia urens var. hanangensis include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which are used topically and internally to harness its medicinal benefits.
